title: What You Want (WYW)
description:
The only Vanilla client Modpack you want, in order to experience Minecraft to the fullest...
Lots of QOL features and bug-fixes included (with performance mods).
Fully Customizable (through mod configs)...
Can connect to all vanilla servers (anti-ban)...
body:
WYW is a completely vanilla-based modpack with lots of QOL features and bug-fixes included (with all possible and compatible performance boosting mods- shaders support included) in order to experience Minecraft to the fullest...
The Modpack is fully Customizable through the individual mod configs...
Every mod is client-sided and server-friendly; implying that you can connect to all vanilla servers without worrying about being banned...
Many other interesting mod features also present in the modpack - for you to find out...



Resource Packs Used in the modpack:-

1. Super RPG Font -> https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/super-rpg-font

2. Vanilla Tweaks -> https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs

3. Shiny Ores -> https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shiny-ores-countxd
